title: MCP Server Artifact Context
description: Validates artifact.context for application/vnd.agience.mcp-server+json artifacts. Registered in a workspace to connect an external MCP server.

url.description: Base URL of the MCP server. Discovery fetched from {url}/.well-known/mcp.json.

name.description: Display name override. Falls back to manifest display_name.

auth.description: Auth config for connecting to the server.

secret_ref.description: Reference to a user secret key for the token value.

manifest.description: Cached snapshot of /.well-known/mcp.json at registration time.

pinned_version.description: Locked semver version. If set, platform warns when a newer server version is published.
